name: Capital One VentureOne Rewards Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 20,000 bonus miles once you spend $500 on purchases within the first 3 months — worth $200 in travel

earning_rates.notes: Earn 1.25 miles per dollar on every purchase, every day

sources.notes: Business Insider: 1.25 miles per dollar, no annual fee, no foreign transaction fees
The Points Guy: flat 1.25 miles, introduction to Capital One miles ecosystem
CNN Underscored: simplicity, Capital One miles access, lack of annual and foreign fees

notes: Best no-annual-fee Capital One travel card. Earn 1.25 miles on all purchases (lower than Venture's 2X). 20,000 mile welcome bonus ($200 travel value). Miles are transferable to Capital One's 15+ travel partners. No annual fee and no foreign transaction fees make it a solid first travel card or backup for international travel. Upgrade path to regular Venture (2X) or Venture X ($395). No lounge access or high-end travel protections.
